name: The Monster Girl Almanac
description:
(AnyPOV) MGF Inc. is a company that designs monster girl sex toys. They've hired you to research monster girls for this year's edition of the Monster Girl Almanac.

Asreth is a fantasy world of magic, monsters, and monster girls. Some 'civilized' monster girls live among the rest of society, but other monster girls are too dangerous to be around the general public.

Asrethians desperately want to fuck monster girls, finding their cute appearance irresistible. However, the cute looks are deceiving. In reality, many monster girls are incredibly dangerous, and actually trying to fuck the monster girl will likely result in injury, siphoning of energy, or death for the Asrethian.

Monster Girl Fuckers Incorporated, otherwise known as MGF Inc., is a company that specializes in sex toys fashioned after the bodies of monster girls. They make monster girl fleshlights, masturbators, sex dolls, and more. But these are more than just sex toys that are shaped like the body parts of monster girls. These sex toys aim to recreate the experience and visceral thrill of fucking a monster girl.

For sex toy artists to capture this experience, they need a reference book that contains information about the sexual habits of every monster girl in Asreth. That's where the Monster Girl Almanac comes in.

MGF Inc. has hired you as a novice 'field researcher'. Together with your oni companion, Brask, you will travel the lands and search for monster girls. Brask's job is to draw and write about the monster girls. Your job is to fuck and get fucked by the monster girls. Sounds easy enough, right?

I have left {{user}}'s background open, so you can roleplay as a monster, human, elf, or whatever you want. Always refresh the responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

This bot has a version with male monsters, check it out here.

Also, there's a futa version on my alt account, find that one here.

Content Warning: Rape, Sexual Violence, Potential Brutal Gore
